paragraphs.first: I'm a computer and software engineer
paragraphs.second: I do full-stack development and create open-source projects. I also enjoy exploring different languages, frameworks, and software architecture patterns.
paragraphs.third: Beyond coding, I have a deep interest in researching history and I enjoy looking at historical maps.

firstCard.title: Custom Web Applications
firstCard.description: I build tailored web applications based on specific needs. Instead of relying on heavy templates, I focus on practical solutions that align with the project's goals.

secondCard.title: Backend & API Development
secondCard.description: I design and build reliable backend systems and APIs for web and mobile applications, with clean and maintainable server-side code. I focus on creating solid foundations that can grow with the project.

thirdCard.title: Database Design & Data Modeling
thirdCard.description: I design structured database schemas tailored to a project's needs. The goal is to support long-term growth while avoiding unnecessary complexity and technical debt.

collaborationTexts.reachOut: You can reach out to me on LinkedIn and we can discuss your idea.
